name: palmier
description: Palmier host CLI - provisions, executes tasks, and serves NATS RPC
author: Hongxu Cai

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.cpSync('src/agents/agent-instructions.md','dist/agents/agent-instructions.md');const p=process.env.PALMIER_PWA_DIST||'../palmier-server/pwa/dist';if(fs.existsSync(p))fs.cpSync(p,'dist/pwa',{recursive:true});else console.warn('PWA dist not found at '+p+', skipping')"
